ops.body: Fixed upstream in cc-notes cdf40e1d 'fix(hooks): pure mcp_active + deterministic record inline tests' (released, latest v0.31.0) — the root cause was mode-dependent mcp_active() wording vs static inline test patterns, resolved with deterministic/mode-agnostic tests rather than the naive MCP-form recodify (which would have broken CI). Verified from cc-context 2026-07-14: uvx capt-hook --hooks .claude/hooks test → 0 of the 5 drift failures remain (382/382 passed on the old tool env; 446/446 on capt-hook 9.13.0). See memory capt-hook-pack-test-cache-and-mode for the mechanics.
